# Social Preview

This directory contains the social preview image for the Sagittarius GitHub repository.

## GitHub Repository Social Preview

GitHub displays a social preview image (1280×640px) when the repository is shared on social media, in search results, and in the repository sidebar.

### Specifications

- **Dimensions:** 1280×640 pixels (2:1 aspect ratio)
- **Format:** PNG (recommended) or JPG
- **Max file size:** 1MB
- **Text safe area:** Center 1000×400px (margins may be cropped on mobile)

### Design Guidelines

The social preview should:
- Feature the Sagittarius logo or wordmark prominently
- Use the iCloud-inspired blue (#007AFF) as an accent color
- Include a brief tagline: "JMAP Web Client" or "Modern Email, Any Server"
- Show a subtle screenshot or UI element (optional)
- Have clean, readable text at small sizes

### Where to Update

Upload the final image at:
**Settings → General → Social preview** (requires repository admin access)

### Tools for Creation

- **Figma:** [Open Graph Image Template](https://www.figma.com/community/file/...) — Use a template
- **Canva:** Search "GitHub Social Preview" templates
- **Photoshop/GIMP:** Create 1280×640 canvas

### Current Status

⬜ Social preview image needs to be created and uploaded to GitHub repository settings
